query: Write tests/commands/create-cart.hurl and tests/queries/cart-summary.hurl for the Cart feature. The endpoints don't exist yet — this is the RED outer loop before any implementation. I need [Captures] to grab the entityId from the create-cart response and reuse it in the cart-summary assert.

add an e2e hurl test for the reserve-stock command — it should POST to localhost:8080/commands/reserve-stock with productId and quantity fields, then GET /queries/stock-level with retry because the query is eventually consistent

i need to test the reject path for add-to-cart — when someone sends a negative quantity the decider calls Decider.reject, so the response should be 400 with tag Rejected. how do i write that assertion in the .hurl file?

Write a multi-step scenario hurl file under tests/scenarios/ that creates two library books, captures both entityIds, then queries /queries/book-summary with retry and verifies both appear independently using jsonpath filter with nth 0

my cart-summary query returns the paginated shape with $.items, $.total, $.hasMore — writting a hurl e2e that creates a cart, captrues entityId, then retries the query until the cart shows up in $.items[?(@.cartSummaryId == '{{cart_id}}')]
kick off the outside-in TDD red outer loop for the checkout feature: write the hurl files first so neo test immediately shows 404, before i touch any .hs implementation files

I have a StockReservation command and StockLevel query in my event-model.json. Need the HTTP-level end-to-end test files written to tests/commands/ and tests/queries/ with proper [Options] retry on the query side — the integration is asynchronous so the read model lags behind.

how do i verify an outbound integration side-effect fired? i want to POST /commands/place-order, then GET /queries/stock-level and assert the reserved field went up — with a higher retry count and longer retry-interval since the integration handler takes time
the create-cart.hurl test is returning 404 — help me register the CreateCart command and CartSummary query in Service.hs and App.hs so the endpoint comes live and the hurl test turns green
write the acceptance tests for the ReserveStock command that exercise the domain logic in memory without hitting HTTP — I want to test the decide function behavior using the in-domain test harness

implement the CartSummary query handler — write the Haskell projection that listens for CartCreated events and builds the paginated read model so the /queries/cart-summary endpoint returns $.items with the right shape

I want to curl /queries/stock-level while the app is running to see whether it returns a bare array or an items-wrapped paginated shape. How do I start the NeoHaskell app and inspect the live endpoint response?
write unit tests for the CreateCart decider — given an empty cart command when the entityId is already taken then the decide function should reject. GWT style, one assertion per test.
Add the CheckoutCart command node and OrderSummary query node to event-model.json before I start the TDD slices — need to get the event model right so I know what fields each command carries
walk me through the full outside-in TDD workflow for a new Library feature: where does the hurl e2e fit relative to the feature tests, unit tests, domain modeling, and wire-feature steps?
implement the AddItemToCart command — write the decide and update functions in Haskell so the command handler is complete and the existing hurl e2e test can go from red to green when I wire it
